positive: Minimalist vector illustration, central composition, depicting a stylized, wise owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl has wide, expressive eyes and large, detailed feather textures. The overall style is delicate woodcut mixed with crisp, modern line art, featuring deep indigo blue, emerald green, and warm gold accents against a cream background. Use negative space dramatically to enhance the silhouette and create a mystical, ethereal feel. The composition must be highly detailed for apparel printing, designed with strong outlines and clean, solid color blocks. High contrast, symmetrical placement, perfect symmetry.
